gate.subtitle: Admin only
gate.description: Only an admin can review and approve uploaded data.

intake.loadError: Could not load Data Intake approvals.

empty.title: No imports awaiting approval
empty.description: Batches submitted from the Data Intake Center appear here for an approver to commit or reject.

buttons.approveTitle: Approve and commit to live tables

intake.rejectConfirm: Reject the {module} import ({count} rows)? It will not be committed to live tables.

empty.pendingDescription: Uploads submitted by non-admins will appear here for review.
empty.historyDescription: Approved and rejected uploads will be listed here.

legacy.deleteConfirm: Delete the upload batch "{file}" ({count} rows)? This removes the staged data permanently and cannot be undone.
legacy.insertFailed: Insert failed for "{file}" ({inserted} of {total} rows committed): {message}

intakeModal.subtitle: Read-only staged data. Approve to commit only the ready rows; errors and duplicates are skipped server-side.
intakeModal.noRows: No staged rows found for this batch.

editModal.editableSubtitle: Edit any cell, fix a whole column, or remove rows - then Save.
editModal.showingMatching: Showing {shown} of {total} matching rows. Use the filter to find specific rows; “Apply to all” affects every row in the batch.
